questionHtml:
Which properties increase down the group 1 alkali metals?

  1. atomic radii
  2. melting point
  3. reactivity with water


A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: Which properties increase down the group 1 alkali metals? atomic radii melting point reactivity with water A. I and II only B. I and III only C. II and III only D. I, II and III
